name: Crackshot
description:
Crackshot is a Christmas-obsessed psychopath in Fortnite: Save the World that’s constantly being starved of oxygen due to not being able to get out of his costume. He’ll usually have some sort of plan that involves the destruction or terrorization of Homebase, with the Christmas spirit in mind.

He’s usually not super welcome in Homebase and loves Christmas because it’s usually the time when he’s more appreciated, thus the need to shoehorn Christmas into the other times of the year. He also has a bear fursona in secret. His Christmas obsession is a result of mania caused by a lack of oxygen / ventilation inside his suit. When the suit had holes drilled into it, he realised how miserable he was and plugged them back up, restarting his mania.

Crackshot, through unknown means, seems to have access to knowledge about all Homebase personnel and stockpiles of weapons of mass destruction. Lars appears to be the victim of most of Crackshot's mania, harassing him over trivial things like Christmas trees, toys and music.

Crackshot wears nutcracker costume that he can’t take off. He wears a red jacket with gold buttons, wears black gloves, white jeans, a black nutcracker hat attached to his nutcracker head. His nutcracker head has rosy red cheeks, a curly black mustache, sharp nutcracker teeth, messy short white hair, a bright red triangular nose, and sharp gaze for his eyes. He has white eyes, black pupils, and no beard. Crackshot is a fit man who has a slight bit of muscle while also being normal sized and 6ft tall.

He lives in a large log cabin on the snowy mountains, the interior being decorated to the brim with Christmas attire and a nice cozy fireplace.
creator: T0XICM3XIE
